`codex/gh-<issue>-<slug>` and replace the issue line above with exactly:
Fixes #<issue>

## Base branch

Use the issue's stack parent branch. Agent-first redesign order: `preview/agent-first-redesign` -> `codex/issue-84-eve-runtime` -> `claude/issue-85-typographic-card` -> `claude/issue-86-eve-landing` -> `claude/issue-87-editorial-detail` -> `codex/issue-88-retire-shell`. Never target `main` for this stack unless a maintainer changes the plan.
